marshallese.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Ejjeḷọk men eḷap. Fieldwork ekkā, wōnṃaanḷọk epen.
marshallese.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Watershed eo ej mour ilo aolep jikin. Headwaters rej ṃōḷo im erreo. Mainstem ej bar bōk ek. Beaver wetlands rej kōṃṃan jerbal in floodplain. Eñin wāween watershed-scale recovery ñe timing im community rej koba ippān doon.
marshallese.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Enañin aolep components rej eṃṃanḷọk. Jejjo rej aikuj jerbal. Trajectory eṃṃan im community eo ej bōk kuṇaan.
marshallese.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Jet anjọ, jet jako. Watershed work eṃool ekkā jab āinwōt juon; jet ṃōttan raar eṃṃanḷọk ke jet raar bōjrak.
marshallese.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Quality eo ettā im jejjo wōt components raar tōpar recovery thresholds. Eñin wāween an watersheds jorrāān ilo ejjeḷọk keroro ñe stewardship ejjab maroñ loore pressures ko.
marshallese.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Initial conditions rej āinwōt remaroñ jerbal. Kōjerbal Year 1 ñan citizen-science monitoring im katak ñan kalōk community support ṃokta jān aṃ kōjerbale ilo jerbal ko rej akwāāl kaki āinwōt dam removal.
marshallese.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Ta eo kwōmaroñ kōṃṃane ñan component in
marshallese.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Component quality ilo aolepān campaign in iiō 10
marshallese.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Chart in quality trend iiō-ñan-iiō ekkar ñan watershed component
marshallese.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ AI watershed educator ej riiti watershed data eo aṃ...
marshallese.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Ejjab juon armej in Wabanaki, ejjab juon watershed coordinator ak hydrologist eṃool, im ejjab kōnono kōn jabdewōt Wabanaki nation, agency, ak organization.
marshallese.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Ñan ainikien ko rōṃool kōn Maine watershed work, kajjitōk ippān Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, im Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
marshallese.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Watershed Steward: Maine campaign in iiō 10
marshallese.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Jiljino watershed components, joñoul iiō, Maine pressures ko rōṃool: dam barriers, agricultural runoff, suburban stormwater, floods im droughts ko climate ej bōktok.
marshallese.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Hydrological feedback rules rej lukwoj er ippān doon.
marshallese.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Buffers ko reṃṃan rej kaṃōḷo headwater streams. Beaver wetlands rej kadikḷọk floods im karreoik mainstem. Ag runoff eḷap an dik ej kōtḷọk river eo bwe en menono. Rivers ko rej koba im ellor rej bar bōktok salmon im alewife runs.
marshallese.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Ta eḷaññe kwaar kōṃṃan ejjeḷọk ñan iiō 10?
marshallese.what_changed_this_year: Ta eo ear oktak iiō in
marshallese.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Kajjitōk ippān AI watershed educator bwe en riiti watershed data eo aṃ
marshallese.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: AI watershed-science educator ej riiti wāween eo aṃ kiiō
marshallese.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Ejjeḷọk actions iiō in. Kāālōt juon component, kāālōt juon technique.
marshallese.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Condensation ejjab bwe — eḷap an māāṇāṇ ak eḷap an ṃōrā.
marshallese.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Condensation eruṃwij. Precipitation epen ak eineeṃṃan.
marshallese.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Moisture eḷap + temp eṃōḷo + lift ekajoor → convective precipitation eḷap.
marshallese.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Ukōt cloud moisture, temperature, im kōto. Widget ej kōjenolọk precipitation ñan juon iaan emān types ko rejenolọk. Ejjeḷọk score, ejjeḷọk reveal — kōṃṃakūt im lale.
marshallese.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hypothesis (free text): Ta eo ej kōṃṃan storm ippān drizzle?
marshallese.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Kwōj jaḷ — kwaḷọk prompts ko rōpeḷḷọk
marshallese.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Dāpij ruo sliders repen. Kōṃṃakūt juon. Lale.
marshallese.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Pukot ruo settings rej kōṃṃan type eo wōt juon.
marshallese.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Storms ṃool rej aikuj moisture im instability ippān doon. Etale.
marshallese.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ij meḷeḷe — kōmḷeḷeik ilo naan ko aṃ
marshallese.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Kōmḷeḷeik ewi wāween moisture, temperature, im kōto rej jiṃor kōṃṃan precipitation type.
marshallese.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Design note: discrete 4-type precipitation marker; ejjeḷọk rainfall-rate score; ejjeḷọk reveal — by design.
marshallese.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Water Cycle. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 ñan 6 kāālōt juon stage, J ej ukōt Journey mode, R U P kāālōt journey path eo aṃ.
marshallese.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Oktak ñan Watershed Steward campaign in iiō 10
marshallese.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: uwe ilo juon droplet jān lọjet ñan lọjet. Kwōnaaj jino ilo lọjet, evaporate, tōtōr ñan juon cloud, wōtlọk āinwōt wōt, innām kāālōt juon path ilaḷ (river runoff, underground infiltration, ak plant ej būki). Path kajjojo ej bōk iien eoktak. Kadedeḷọk loop eo ñan log juon journey; 3 loops ej kōpeḷḷọk Journey badge.
marshallese.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Kwaar uwe ilo water molecule EO WŌT aolepān iaḷ — ear oktak form (liquid → vapor → liquid) ak ejjeḷọk iien kōṃṃane ak kọkkure. Kajjojo droplet kwōj idaak ej cycle ñan billions iiō.
marshallese.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Erom juon water droplet im ito-itak ilujen aolepān water cycle! Kōṃṃan pepe ilo kajjojo stage im katak science eo ilikin kajjojo transformation.
marshallese.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Kajjitōk juon kajjitōk (waanjoñak, Etke clouds rej pepepe?)...
marshallese.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Dān eo kōjparok — runoff + ta eo ej ọuij ≈ 100% in wōt eo ej tōpar laḷ. Ejjeḷọk ej jako; ej wōt bōk paths ko rejenolọk rọọl ñan lọjet.
